# Roof Express

> Diamond Certified roofing contractor serving 60 Bay Area cities. Residential & commercial roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters, skylights. CSLB #1072766. Free estimates at 650-666-5554.

## Pages

- [Bay Area Roofing Contractor — Free Estimates](https://roof-ex.com/)
  Diamond Certified roofing contractor serving San Francisco Bay Area. Roof repair, replacement, flat roofing, gutters & skylights. CSLB #1072766. Free estimates.

- [About Us — Diamond Certified Bay Area Roofer](https://roof-ex.com/about)
  Meet the Roof Express team — Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite, CertainTeed Select ShingleMaster. 5,000+ projects. Bay Area's trusted roofer since 2017.

- [Our Story — Bay Area Roofing Since 2017](https://roof-ex.com/story)
  How Roof Express grew from a single crew in 2017 to the Bay Area's top-rated roofing company. Diamond Certified, locally owned, community driven.

- [Customer Reviews — 5-Star Rated Roofer](https://roof-ex.com/reviews)
  Hundreds of verified 5-star reviews on Google, Yelp & Diamond Certified. See why Bay Area homeowners trust Roof Express.

- [Contact Us — Free Roofing Estimate Bay Area](https://roof-ex.com/contact)
  Get a free roofing estimate from Roof Express. Same-day inspections, 24-hour digital quotes. Call 650-666-5554 or book online.

- [Our Roofing Process — 3-Checkpoint Quality System](https://roof-ex.com/methodology)
  Roof Express 3-checkpoint methodology: rapid tear-off, mid-point inspection, final audit. Most roofs completed in 2-3 days.

- [Roofing Financing — $0 Down, Flexible Payments](https://roof-ex.com/financing)
  Finance your new roof with $0 down through Wisetack. Up to $25,000, flexible terms, soft credit check. Apply in minutes.

- [Project Gallery — Before & After Bay Area Roofs](https://roof-ex.com/gallery)
  Browse 150+ completed roofing projects. Before-and-after photos of residential & commercial work across the Bay Area.

- [Roofing FAQ — Costs, Timelines & Materials](https://roof-ex.com/faq)
  Answers to common Bay Area roofing questions about costs, permits, timelines, materials, and choosing a contractor.

- [Roofing Blog — Bay Area Tips & Cost Guides](https://roof-ex.com/blog)
  Expert roofing articles covering Bay Area costs, materials, maintenance schedules, and city-specific guides.

- [Field Notes — Roofing Knowledge Base & Job-Site Insights](https://roof-ex.com/blog/field-notes)
  Real roofing field notes from Bay Area job sites. Material breakdowns, installation techniques, shingle comparisons, flat roof systems, ventilation, flashing, and permit guides — documented by our Diamond Certified crew.

- [Roofing Services — Repair to Replacement](https://roof-ex.com/services)
  Full-service Bay Area roofing: residential, commercial, flat roofs, gutters, skylights, and 24/7 emergency repairs.

- [Residential Roofing — Shingle & Tile Systems](https://roof-ex.com/residential)
  Expert residential roofing for Bay Area homes. Asphalt shingles, tile, slate — Diamond Certified installation with 50-year warranty.

- [Commercial Roofing — TPO & Flat Roof Systems](https://roof-ex.com/commercial)
  Commercial roofing for Bay Area businesses. TPO, modified bitumen, single-ply systems. Title 24 compliant. Zero-downtime protocol.

- [Flat Roofing — TPO, Torch-Down & Coatings](https://roof-ex.com/flat)
  Bay Area flat roof specialists. TPO membrane, modified bitumen, torch-down, and silicone coatings. Ponding water solutions.

- [Roof Repair — Fast Leak Fixes, Same Day](https://roof-ex.com/roof-repair)
  Same-day roof repair in the Bay Area. Leak detection, emergency tarping, flashing repair, and shingle replacement.

- [Roof Replacement — Full System, 50-Year Warranty](https://roof-ex.com/roof-replacement)
  Complete roof replacement by Diamond Certified contractors. GAF Master Elite installation with up to 50-year manufacturer warranty.

- [Gutter Installation — Seamless Aluminum & Copper](https://roof-ex.com/gutters)
  Custom seamless gutter installation for Bay Area homes. Aluminum, copper, steel systems. Proper sizing and slope for maximum drainage.

- [Skylight Installation & Repair — Velux Certified](https://roof-ex.com/skylights)
  Velux skylight installation, repair, and replacement. Sun tunnels, deck-mount & curb-mount skylights. Leak-free flashing guaranteed.

- [Emergency Roof Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Response](https://roof-ex.com/emergency)
  24/7 emergency roof repair across the Bay Area. Storm damage, active leaks, emergency tarping. Call 650-666-5554 now.
